meta.title: CR YAPIM — Creative Technology Studio · Istanbul
meta.description: A creative technology studio turning ideas into living digital experiences. AI, mobile and web, games, UI/UX, brand identity, story & universe design, content and social media.

world.gatewayLead: Each section is its own realm — full content lives here; go deeper on the dedicated page anytime.

about.label: About
about.headlineL3: We build a whole digital world for an idea.
body: CR YAPIM helps brands, startups and creative ideas not just become visible, but build their own digital universes. We craft an idea's story, shape its brand identity, design its digital product and develop its software.

We build its AI solutions, bring its mobile app to life, gamify it, produce its content and grow it on social media. We bring technology, design and storytelling under one roof — because in the future, people won't just buy products; they'll choose the worlds they can step into.

items.title: AI Solutions
items.body: Custom AI products, assistants and automations — end to end, from idea to a working model.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.body: End-to-end mobile apps for iOS and Android, from design to release.

items.title: Web Design & Engineering
items.body: Fast, modern, scalable websites and apps — design and engineering together.

items.title: Game Development
items.body: Gamified experiences and original games for brands and startups.

items.title: Digital Product Design (UI/UX)
items.body: We design every moment a user spends with a product — interface, flow and experience.

items.title: Brand Identity & Strategy
items.body: We build a brand's voice, look and stance from the ground up.

items.title: Story & Universe Design
items.body: We craft the worlds and narratives a brand can be stepped into.

items.title: Content Production
items.body: From copy to visuals to video and social content — all of a brand's content.

items.title: Social Media Management
items.body: Strategy and management where communities grow and brands speak.

items.title: 3D Experiences & Digital Presentations
items.body: We bring products and ideas to life with 3D scenes and interactive presentations.

items.name: Digital World
items.desc: A brand's story, identity and web experience merged into a single digital universe — a brand world users can step into and explore.

items.name: AI Product
items.desc: An AI-powered product for a startup that understands and answers user questions — built end to end, from interface to model.

items.name: Game & Mobile Experience
items.desc: A gamified mobile experience built for a brand campaign, brought to life with interactive mechanics and 3D scenes.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.body: We clarify the idea, the goal and the story together, and set the project's starting point.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: We build the brand language, the experience and the visual world before development begins.

steps.title: Development
steps.body: We bring the software, app or product to life. Design and technology in one crew.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We ship the product and support its growth with content and social media.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.lead: Every great project begins with an idea. And every idea is a story waiting to be told.

lines.b: But we don't just build software.
But we don't just draw interfaces.
But we don't just prepare posts.

manifesto.close: We build digital universes people can connect with.
manifesto.sig: CR YAPIM — a new-generation digital creation studio where technology meets aesthetics, software meets story, and AI meets human creativity.

cta.sub: Bring your idea — from its story to its software, its design to its AI, we'll build the rest together.

form.name: Name
form.success: Your message has arrived. We'll get back to you shortly.
